chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.D-721 of 2024 Constitutional Petition No.D-722 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.06.2024 Mr. Karamullah Memon advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Moharram Abro, Advocate for respondents No. 6 and 7 a/w Administrator Market Committee Mirpurkhas. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajpar, A.A.G. = Administrator Market Committee Mirpurkhas is present today and has placed two cheques of Rs.100,000/= each for handing over to the Petitioners. It is completely unacceptable that in the proceeding we are just recording receipt of cheque to the Petitioners, which is the responsibility of the Accounts Department of the Respondents. Learned A.A.G has no clue whether directions to stop salary of Administrator Market Committee has been carried out or not. Today Administrator Market Committee states that he also does not know about such fact. The Petitioners, who are present in Court are old age citizens and their counsel has stated that they are facing acute hardship. Unless all legitimate dues of petitioners are paid, salary of the Secretary Finance Government of Sindh be stopped forthwith. Learned AAG will file compliance report about the directions of this Court regarding stopping of salary of Administrator Market Committee Mirpurkhas and Secretary Finance Government of Sindh till payment of all outstanding legitimate dues of the petitioners. To be listed on 09-07-2024 at 11:30 a.m. 2 Copy of this order be communicated by E-mail and FAX to. Finance Minister, Government of Sindh.. Secretary Finance, Government of Sindh, Accountant General, Government of Sindh and Advocate General, Government of Sindh.
Finance Minister, Government of Sindh.. Secretary Finance, Government of Sindh, Accountant General, Government of Sindh and Advocate General, Government of Sindh. JUDGE JUDGE “Saleem”
